audit_scores.reasoning: Strong audit with specific file references, technically sound findings across all dimensions, and well-calibrated importance scores that prioritize security and correctness appropriately for medical imaging.

findings.description: GLCM and GLRLM texture feature computation uses nested loops without vectorization, causing slow processing on large 3D volumes
findings.fix: Vectorize GLCM/GLRLM calculations using matrix operations and pre-allocate feature arrays

findings.description: Hosmer-Lemeshow test implementation may fail with small sample sizes or extreme probability bins
findings.fix: Add minimum sample size checks and bin merging logic for robust H-L test computation

findings.description: Large DICOM volumes loaded into memory simultaneously during parfor processing can exhaust RAM on systems with many workers
findings.fix: Implement memory-aware worker allocation and sequential processing fallback when available RAM is insufficient

findings.description: API rate limiting errors from Gemini/Claude are caught but may cause incomplete batch processing without proper retry logic
findings.fix: Implement exponential backoff retry mechanism for API rate limits with configurable max retries

findings.description: Shell escaping on Windows may be vulnerable to command injection with certain special characters in paths
findings.fix: Use more robust Windows shell escaping with comprehensive special character handling

findings.description: Function contains multiple distinct survival analysis tasks (Cox PH, competing risks, time-varying) in a single 500+ line function
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: fit_cox_ph_models.m, compute_competing_risks.m, analyze_time_varying_effects.m

findings.description: Registration quality metrics (Jacobian determinant, NCC, mutual information) lack unit tests for edge cases
findings.fix: Add test cases for singular Jacobian matrices, identical images, and mismatched dimensions

findings.description: Path handling for saved_files folder discovery may fail on Windows with mixed path separators
findings.fix: Use pathlib.Path.resolve() consistently and normalize all path separators before processing

findings.description: Variable names are inconsistent (feat_matrix vs features_matrix) and correlation threshold is hardcoded
findings.fix: Standardize variable naming and make correlation threshold configurable parameter

findings.description: Large MAT files are loaded entirely into memory even when only specific variables are needed
findings.fix: Use scipy.io.loadmat with variable_names parameter to load only required variables

audit_scores.reasoning: Excellent specificity with concrete file:function references and detailed technical fixes. Strong coverage across all dimensions including domain-critical areas like registration quality and survival analysis. Well-calibrated importance scores that appropriately weight security and correctness issues highest.

findings.description: GLCM computation uses nested loops with poor cache locality and redundant distance/angle calculations for each parameter map
findings.fix: Pre-compute GLCM offsets outside loops, use vectorized operations for distance calculations, and implement sliding window optimization for large 3D volumes

findings.description: Hosmer-Lemeshow test implementation does not handle edge case where expected counts in bins are zero, leading to division by zero in chi-square calculation
findings.fix: Add check for zero expected counts and either merge bins or use modified test statistic that handles sparse data appropriately

findings.description: Large DWI volumes are loaded entirely into memory for each patient in parfor loop without chunking, causing memory pressure with high b-value datasets
findings.fix: Implement volume chunking strategy that processes slices or blocks sequentially while maintaining parallel patient processing

findings.description: Registration failure cases are not handled - function assumes successful registration but does not validate transformation quality or detect registration failures
findings.fix: Add registration quality checks using Jacobian determinant bounds, mutual information thresholds, and fallback to rigid registration on DIR failure

findings.description: PH assumption test using Spearman correlation does not account for tied event times, which can bias the test statistic in datasets with discrete survival times
findings.fix: Implement tie-adjusted Spearman correlation or use alternative PH test methods like weighted residuals that handle ties appropriately

findings.description: BCa bootstrap implementation recomputes acceleration constant for each bootstrap iteration instead of computing once, leading to O(B²) complexity
findings.fix: Pre-compute acceleration constant using jackknife before bootstrap loop, reducing complexity to O(B) and significantly improving performance for large B

findings.description: Image data is base64 encoded and sent to external APIs without validation of image content or size limits, potentially exposing sensitive information
findings.fix: Add image content validation, implement size limits, strip EXIF metadata, and add option to anonymize/blur patient identifiers in images before API calls

findings.description: Time-varying coefficient implementation does not properly handle left truncation or late entry, which can bias hazard ratio estimates in observational studies
findings.fix: Add proper left truncation handling using entry times and implement robust variance estimation for time-varying effects with late entry

findings.description: Function contains 4 distinct analysis workflows (elastic net, LOOCV, diagnostics, feature assembly) in single 300+ line function, violating single responsibility principle
findings.fix: Already partially refactored into utils functions. Complete the refactoring by moving remaining inline code blocks to separate utility functions

findings.description: New registration quality metrics function lacks unit tests for Jacobian determinant bounds, NCC edge cases, and mutual information calculation
findings.fix: Add comprehensive unit tests covering boundary conditions, degenerate transformations, and validation against known registration scenarios

findings.description: scipy.io.loadmat loads entire MAT file into memory even when only specific variables are needed, wasteful for large metric files
findings.fix: Use h5py or scipy's variable_names parameter to selectively load only required variables, reducing memory usage for large MAT files

findings.description: Function uses hardcoded path separators in temporary file creation and does not handle Windows long path limitations for deep directory structures
findings.fix: Use fullfile() for all path construction and implement long path handling for Windows using \\?\ prefix when needed

findings.description: Net reclassification improvement calculation does not validate that risk thresholds are monotonically increasing, which can lead to invalid NRI values
findings.fix: Add validation that risk_thresholds array is sorted in ascending order and handle edge cases where thresholds are equal or improperly ordered

findings.description: Chart.js data generation does not handle NaN/Inf values in datasets, which can break JavaScript rendering and cause silent failures in browser
findings.fix: Add NaN/Inf filtering and replacement with null values in JSON serialization, with explicit handling in Chart.js configuration for missing data points

findings.description: All imputation methods are computed simultaneously and stored in memory before comparison, causing excessive memory usage for large longitudinal datasets
findings.fix: Implement streaming comparison that computes one imputation method at a time, compares metrics, and discards intermediate results

audit_scores.reasoning: Audit provides specific file:function citations with domain-appropriate statistical fixes (Schoenfeld residuals, Hosmer-Lemeshow test) and covers all relevant dimensions. Most importance scores are well-calibrated, though some performance issues could be rated slightly lower.

findings.description: GLCM and GLRLM computations are performed without vectorization, using nested loops that could be optimized with matrix operations
findings.fix: Vectorize GLCM and GLRLM calculations using matrix operations instead of nested loops, pre-allocate output arrays

findings.description: Schoenfeld residuals computation may produce incorrect results when there are tied event times, as standard Cox model assumptions break down
findings.fix: Add tied event time detection and use Efron approximation method for tied times in Cox regression

findings.description: Function does not validate that transformation matrices are invertible before applying deformable registration
findings.fix: Add matrix determinant check and condition number validation before applying transformations

findings.description: Function is 200+ lines with mixed responsibilities: API calls, image processing, CSV writing, and error handling
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: process_image_batch(), handle_api_response(), write_analysis_csv()

findings.description: Large DICOM volumes are loaded into memory without checking available RAM, potentially causing OOM on systems with limited memory
findings.fix: Add memory usage estimation based on image dimensions and available system memory before loading

findings.description: Switch statement with 11 cases has duplicated parameter validation code across multiple branches
findings.fix: Extract common parameter validation into helper function, use function handles for method dispatch

findings.description: No unit tests exist for registration quality metrics (Jacobian determinant, NCC, mutual information)
findings.fix: Add comprehensive test suite covering edge cases: identity transforms, large deformations, noise sensitivity

findings.description: Base64 encoding of images does not validate file size limits before processing, allowing potential DoS through large image uploads
findings.fix: Add file size validation (max 10MB) before base64 encoding, implement image dimension checks

findings.description: Windows shell escaping may fail with Unicode characters or paths containing non-ASCII characters
findings.fix: Add Unicode path handling and test with international characters, use system-specific encoding detection

findings.description: Distance matrix computation is O(n²) and not optimized for sparse missing data patterns
findings.fix: Implement sparse distance computation that skips calculations for features with no missing values

findings.description: Hosmer-Lemeshow test may produce incorrect p-values when expected frequencies are less than 5 in any bin
findings.fix: Add expected frequency validation and use exact test or combine bins when frequencies are too low

findings.description: JSON serialization failures are not caught when patient data contains NaN or Inf values
findings.fix: Add JSON encoder that handles NaN/Inf values and provides meaningful error messages for serialization failures

findings.description: Multiple large figure objects are created simultaneously without cleanup, potentially exhausting graphics memory
findings.fix: Implement figure cleanup after each visualization, limit concurrent figure objects, add memory monitoring

findings.description: Function contains hardcoded statistical significance thresholds and effect size interpretations
findings.fix: Move thresholds to configuration, create interpretive constants dictionary, make thresholds configurable

findings.description: No tests for stratified Cox models or extended Cox models with time-varying coefficients
findings.fix: Add unit tests covering stratification variables, time-dependent coefficients, and model convergence edge cases

audit_scores.reasoning: Excellent audit with specific file:function citations, technically sound findings that respect medical-physics constraints, and comprehensive coverage across all dimensions. Importance scores are well-calibrated with critical issues (competing risks Brier score, memory exhaustion) appropriately weighted higher than code quality improvements.

findings.description: GLCM computation uses nested loops to calculate co-occurrence matrices, but could leverage MATLAB's built-in graycomatrix function which is vectorized and significantly faster
findings.fix: Replace manual GLCM computation with graycomatrix() and graycoprops() from Image Processing Toolbox, add fallback for systems without the toolbox

findings.description: Brier score calculation does not handle competing risks scenarios where patients may die from other causes, leading to biased calibration assessment
findings.fix: Implement Fine-Gray competing risks Brier score that accounts for cause-specific hazards and censoring patterns

findings.description: IVIM model fitting does not validate that b-values are monotonically increasing, which can cause convergence failures in nonlinear optimization
findings.fix: Add b-value validation to ensure monotonic increasing order and sufficient dynamic range for IVIM parameter estimation

findings.description: Single large function handles Cox PH fitting, Fine-Gray competing risks, time-varying coefficients, and validation metrics without clear separation of concerns
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: fit_cox_ph(), fit_fine_gray(), compute_time_varying_effects(), validate_survival_model()

findings.description: All patient DWI volumes are kept in memory simultaneously during parfor processing, potentially causing memory exhaustion with large cohorts
findings.fix: Implement memory-mapped file access or chunked processing that loads/unloads patient data as needed within parfor workers

findings.description: Magic numbers are hardcoded throughout (e.g., erosion disk radius=2, minimum region size=50) without configuration or adaptive sizing based on voxel resolution
findings.fix: Extract magic numbers to configuration parameters and implement adaptive sizing based on voxel dimensions and tumor volume

findings.description: No unit tests exist for Net Reclassification Improvement (NRI) calculations, which involve complex probability reclassification logic
findings.fix: Add comprehensive tests covering continuous NRI, categorical NRI, and IDI calculations with known reference values

findings.description: While function checks variable types, it does not validate .mat file structure or prevent loading of oversized files that could exhaust memory
findings.fix: Add file size validation and structure inspection before loading, with configurable maximum file size limits

findings.description: File path handling may fail on systems with case-sensitive filesystems when graph filenames have inconsistent capitalization
findings.fix: Implement case-insensitive file matching using pathlib with glob patterns and add filename normalization

findings.description: KNN distance computation recalculates patient-blocking distances for every imputation call instead of caching the blocking matrix
findings.fix: Pre-compute and cache patient-blocking distance matrix to avoid repeated distance calculations across multiple imputation calls

findings.description: Time-varying coefficient estimation may produce unstable results when there are few events in later time periods, leading to unreliable hazard ratio estimates
findings.fix: Add minimum event threshold per time period and implement penalized estimation or smoothing for sparse time regions

findings.description: dcm2niix execution does not validate output file integrity or check for conversion warnings that could indicate corrupted DICOM data
findings.fix: Add output file validation, parse dcm2niix warnings/errors, and implement retry logic for failed conversions

audit_scores.reasoning: Strong audit with specific file citations and actionable fixes across all dimensions. Some technical details could be more precise (e.g., exact line numbers), but findings demonstrate good understanding of medical imaging pipeline requirements and statistical rigor.

findings.description: Shape feature calculations (surface area, volume, sphericity) are computed using pixel-by-pixel iteration over the 3D mask, which is O(n³) complexity and very slow for large volumes
findings.fix: Use regionprops3 built-in function for efficient shape feature calculation, or implement vectorized surface area calculation using gradient-based edge detection

findings.description: Fine-Gray competing risks model does not account for interval censoring when exact event times are unknown, leading to biased cumulative incidence estimates
findings.fix: Implement interval censoring support in Fine-Gray model by using midpoint imputation or multiple imputation for interval-censored observations

findings.description: Normalized cross-correlation calculation does not handle edge case where image standard deviation is zero, causing division by zero error
findings.fix: Add validation to check for zero variance in either image before NCC calculation and return appropriate error code or fallback metric

findings.description: Single function handles image loading, API calls, rate limiting, error recovery, and output formatting in over 200 lines without clear separation of responsibilities
findings.fix: Split into separate classes: ImageProcessor, APIClient, RateLimiter, and OutputFormatter with clear interfaces between components

findings.description: All DWI volumes for motion detection are loaded simultaneously into memory for cross-volume comparison, potentially causing OOM with high b-value acquisitions
findings.fix: Implement sliding window approach that loads only adjacent volume pairs for comparison, reducing peak memory usage from O(n) to O(1)

findings.description: Four different imputation methods are implemented with significant code duplication for missing data pattern detection and validation logic
findings.fix: Extract common validation and pattern detection into helper functions, create abstract imputation interface with concrete implementations

findings.description: No unit tests exist for calibration slope and intercept calculations, which involve complex logistic regression fitting and confidence interval estimation
findings.fix: Add comprehensive test suite covering edge cases: perfect calibration, poor calibration, small sample sizes, and confidence interval accuracy

findings.description: HTML report generation uses string concatenation for user-provided content without proper sanitization, potentially allowing XSS through crafted patient IDs or file names
findings.fix: Use html.escape() for all user-provided strings and implement content security policy headers in generated HTML

findings.description: Unix shell escaping does not handle edge cases with embedded newlines, control characters, or locale-specific characters that could break shell parsing
findings.fix: Implement proper shell escaping using single quotes with proper handling of embedded single quotes and control characters

findings.description: Time-dependent panel construction uses inefficient nested loops with repeated string comparisons and array concatenations instead of vectorized operations
findings.fix: Preallocate output arrays, use logical indexing and ismember for patient matching, replace string comparisons with categorical arrays

findings.description: Inverse probability censoring weights do not account for time-dependent covariates in the censoring mechanism, leading to biased weight estimates
findings.fix: Implement time-dependent IPCW using Cox model for censoring mechanism with time-varying covariates

findings.description: Time-varying Cox model fitting does not validate that time-dependent covariates are properly aligned with event times, potentially causing incorrect hazard estimates
findings.fix: Add validation to ensure time-dependent covariate values are available at all relevant time points and handle missing covariate data appropriately

audit_scores.reasoning: High-quality audit with specific file references and concrete fixes. Covers all major dimensions with domain-appropriate suggestions like delayed entry Cox models and displacement field validation. Some importance scores could be better calibrated (e.g., visualization modularity at 6/10 seems high for a refactoring task).

findings.description: ADC and IVIM model fitting uses nested loops over all voxels with repeated matrix operations that could be vectorized for significant speedup
findings.fix: Vectorize the model fitting by reshaping DWI data into 2D matrix (voxels x b-values) and applying fitting operations across all voxels simultaneously using matrix operations

findings.description: Calibration slope calculation assumes linear relationship between predicted probabilities and log-odds, but this may not hold for extreme probability values near 0 or 1
findings.fix: Add validation to ensure predicted probabilities are within reasonable bounds (0.01-0.99) and use robust regression methods for slope estimation when extreme values are present

findings.description: Nonlinear IVIM fitting does not validate convergence criteria or detect when optimization gets stuck in local minima
findings.fix: Add convergence validation by checking function tolerance, gradient magnitude, and parameter bounds. Implement multiple random starting points when initial fit fails to converge

findings.description: Single monolithic function handles parameter map generation, histogram plotting, scatter plots, and longitudinal trajectories without clear separation
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: plot_parameter_maps(), plot_histograms(), plot_scatter_analysis(), plot_longitudinal_trends() with shared plotting utilities

findings.description: GLRLM computation creates large run-length matrices for all angles simultaneously, consuming excessive memory for high-resolution parameter maps
findings.fix: Process GLRLM angles sequentially instead of simultaneously, computing and aggregating statistics incrementally to reduce peak memory usage

findings.description: Hardcoded morphological operation parameters (erosion disk size, minimum region size) are not adapted to voxel resolution or image size
findings.fix: Calculate morphological parameters based on voxel spacing and image dimensions: erosion_radius = max(1, round(2/min_voxel_size)), min_region = volume_dependent_threshold

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis calculations including net benefit computation and threshold probability sweeping
findings.fix: Create test_decision_curve_analysis.m with test cases for net benefit calculation, threshold sweeping, and comparison with reference implementations

findings.description: CSV file loading does not validate file size or content structure, potentially allowing memory exhaustion attacks through malformed files
findings.fix: Add file size validation (max 100MB), header validation against expected columns, and row count limits before loading full CSV into memory

findings.description: Timestamp folder naming uses colon characters which are invalid in Windows filenames, causing folder creation failures
findings.fix: Replace colons with hyphens in timestamp strings for cross-platform compatibility: datestr(now, 'yyyy-mm-dd_HH-MM-SS') instead of using colons

findings.description: Image encoding to base64 is performed sequentially for each API call, creating encoding overhead when processing large batches
findings.fix: Pre-encode all images to base64 once at batch start and reuse encoded strings for multiple API calls, reducing redundant encoding operations

findings.description: Extended Cox model with time-varying coefficients does not account for delayed entry (left truncation) when patients enter study at different disease stages
findings.fix: Add delayed entry handling by incorporating entry times into survival object and adjusting risk sets accordingly for time-varying coefficient estimation

findings.description: Deformable registration does not validate that displacement field magnitudes are within physiologically reasonable bounds
findings.fix: Add validation for displacement field: check maximum displacement < 50mm, detect folding regions where Jacobian < 0.1, and flag unrealistic deformations

audit_scores.reasoning: Strong specificity with exact file/function citations and technical depth. Good coverage across all audit dimensions with medically-appropriate findings like left truncation in Cox models and anisotropic voxel spacing corrections. Minor accuracy concerns around some implementation suggestions but overall solid technical understanding.

findings.description: Gray-level run-length matrix (GLRLM) computation uses nested loops to build run-length matrices for each direction, which is inefficient for large 3D volumes and could be vectorized using MATLAB's regionprops or bwconncomp functions
findings.fix: Replace nested loop GLRLM computation with vectorized approach using connected component analysis and regionprops to identify run lengths in single pass

findings.description: Extended Cox model with time-varying coefficients does not properly handle left truncation when patients enter study at different calendar times, leading to biased hazard ratio estimates
findings.fix: Add proper left truncation handling by incorporating study entry times and adjusting the risk set calculation for time-varying coefficient estimation

findings.description: Mutual information calculation does not validate that input images have overlapping intensity ranges, which can cause MI calculation to fail or produce meaningless results
findings.fix: Add validation to check for non-empty intersection of intensity histograms and handle cases where images have completely disjoint intensity distributions

findings.description: Single monolithic function handles Cox PH model fitting, competing risks analysis, Kaplan-Meier estimation, log-rank tests, and model validation without separation into focused subfunctions
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: fit_cox_model, fit_competing_risks, compute_km_curves, perform_logrank_test, validate_survival_model for better maintainability and testing

findings.description: All parameter maps and overlay images are kept in memory throughout visualization process, including large 3D volumes that are only needed temporarily for single plot generation
findings.fix: Implement streaming visualization approach where parameter maps are loaded, processed, plotted, and immediately cleared before loading next volume

findings.description: Hardcoded magic numbers for minimum voxel counts (20, 50, 100) and threshold values (0.001, 0.1) are scattered throughout without centralized configuration or adaptive sizing based on image resolution
findings.fix: Extract magic numbers to configuration structure and implement adaptive thresholds based on voxel size and image dimensions

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis net benefit calculations, which involve complex probability threshold optimization and clinical utility assessment
findings.fix: Create comprehensive unit tests covering net benefit calculation edge cases, threshold range validation, and comparison with reference implementations

findings.description: CSV file loading does not validate file size limits or sanitize cell contents, potentially allowing memory exhaustion attacks or injection of malicious data into downstream analysis
findings.fix: Add file size validation, sanitize CSV cell contents by stripping potentially dangerous characters, and implement configurable memory limits for CSV loading

findings.description: Timestamp-based folder creation uses system-dependent date formatting that may include invalid characters for Windows filesystem (colons in time format)
findings.fix: Use cross-platform safe timestamp format by replacing colons with dashes and ensuring all characters are valid for Windows, macOS, and Linux filesystems

findings.description: Image processing and base64 encoding is performed synchronously for each image before batching, causing unnecessary I/O blocking and reducing throughput for large image sets
findings.fix: Implement asynchronous image loading and encoding using asyncio.gather() to parallelize file I/O operations before API calls

findings.description: Hausdorff distance calculation does not account for anisotropic voxel spacing, leading to incorrect distance measurements when slice thickness differs from in-plane resolution
findings.fix: Scale coordinate distances by voxel spacing before computing Hausdorff distance to ensure accurate physical distance measurements

findings.description: Hazard ratio extraction from log files does not validate that confidence intervals are properly ordered (lower < HR < upper) or handle cases where HR extraction fails due to malformed log entries
findings.fix: Add validation for HR confidence interval ordering and implement robust parsing with fallback strategies for malformed log entries

audit_scores.reasoning: Audit provides specific file references and concrete technical fixes across all relevant dimensions. Findings are technically sound with appropriate importance scores, though some performance optimizations could be more precisely quantified.

findings.description: Histogram computation uses MATLAB's histcounts with automatic binning, but for large datasets this creates excessive bins and is computationally expensive. Manual binning with fixed bin counts would be faster.
findings.fix: Replace histcounts calls with manual binning using fixed bin count (e.g., 100 bins) and linspace for bin edges to reduce computation time

findings.description: Calibration intercept calculation assumes logistic regression convergence but does not check for convergence warnings or singular matrix conditions that can produce invalid intercepts
findings.fix: Add convergence checking after glmfit call and validate that coefficient covariance matrix is not singular before computing confidence intervals

findings.description: GLRLM computation does not validate that parameter maps contain sufficient non-zero values, potentially causing empty run-length matrices and subsequent feature calculation failures
findings.fix: Add validation that parameter map has minimum threshold of non-zero voxels before GLRLM computation, return NaN features if insufficient data

findings.description: Function performs Cox PH model fitting, competing risks analysis, time-varying effects, and calibration metrics in a single 500+ line function without clear separation
findings.fix: Extract separate functions for cox_ph_analysis, competing_risks_analysis, time_varying_analysis, and calibration_analysis to improve maintainability

findings.description: All parameter map overlays are generated and kept in memory simultaneously before saving, potentially exhausting memory with large patient cohorts
findings.fix: Process and save parameter maps one at a time, clearing figure handles and memory after each save operation

findings.description: Bootstrap resampling count is hardcoded to 1000 iterations without configuration option or adaptive sizing based on sample size and desired precision
findings.fix: Add bootstrap_iterations parameter to function signature with default 1000, and add adaptive sizing based on sample size for small datasets

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis which involves complex net benefit calculations and threshold optimization logic
findings.fix: Create test_decision_curve_analysis.m with tests for net benefit calculation, threshold validation, and clinical utility interpretation

findings.description: CSV loading does not validate file size limits or sanitize column headers, potentially allowing memory exhaustion or injection attacks through malformed CSV files
findings.fix: Add file size validation before loading, sanitize column headers to alphanumeric characters only, and limit maximum number of rows/columns

findings.description: MATLAB .mat file loading uses scipy.io.loadmat with default parameters that may not handle MATLAB v7.3 files created on different platforms consistently
findings.fix: Add explicit struct_as_record=False and mat_dtype=True parameters to loadmat calls and add fallback to h5py for v7.3 files

findings.description: Mutual information calculation uses double nested loops over all voxel intensities to build joint histogram, which is O(n²) and very slow for high-resolution volumes
findings.fix: Replace nested loops with MATLAB's hist3 function for joint histogram computation or use built-in entropy functions if available

audit_scores.reasoning: High-quality audit with specific file citations, technically sound findings addressing critical domain concerns like survival analysis edge cases and memory management, with well-calibrated importance scores that appropriately prioritize correctness issues over style improvements.

findings.description: Hausdorff distance calculation does not handle edge case where one mask is completely empty, causing bwdist to fail on empty logical arrays
findings.fix: Add validation to check if either mask1 or mask2 is empty and return appropriate default values (e.g., Dice=0, Hausdorff=Inf)

findings.description: Histogram computation uses histcounts in a loop for each bin edge, creating O(n*bins) complexity when it could be computed once in O(n)
findings.fix: Replace loop-based histcounts with single call to histcounts, then apply Laplace smoothing to the resulting bin counts

findings.description: Bootstrap sampling does not validate that the sample size is sufficient for reliable confidence interval estimation, potentially producing unreliable CIs with small datasets
findings.fix: Add validation to ensure sample size >= 30 and warn if bootstrap iterations < 1000, with fallback to normal approximation for small samples

findings.description: All visualization figures are kept open in memory during processing, potentially exhausting graphics handles on systems with limited graphics memory
findings.fix: Implement figure cleanup after each plot is saved, using close(fig) or setting figure visibility to 'off' and closing immediately after saveas

findings.description: Deformable registration does not validate that transformation field dimensions match the input image dimensions, potentially causing misaligned propagation
findings.fix: Add validation to ensure transformation field size matches image dimensions and that displacement vectors are within reasonable bounds

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis calculations, which involve complex net benefit computations and threshold selection
findings.fix: Create test_decision_curve_analysis.m with test cases for net benefit calculation, threshold selection, and edge cases with extreme probability distributions

findings.description: MAT file loading uses scipy.io.loadmat which loads entire file into memory even when only specific variables are needed, inefficient for large MAT files
findings.fix: Use scipy.io.whosmat to inspect variables first, then load only required variables with variable_names parameter

findings.description: Function has multiple magic numbers for time stratification (e.g., 365 days, 730 days) and statistical thresholds (0.05, 0.1) hardcoded without configuration
findings.fix: Extract magic numbers to configurable parameters at function top or pass through config structure

findings.description: Path handling uses string operations and glob patterns that may behave differently on Windows vs Unix systems, particularly with case sensitivity and path separators
findings.fix: Replace string-based path operations with pathlib.Path methods and use Path.glob() for cross-platform consistency

findings.description: Cox model fitting does not handle case where all patients have the same survival time, causing rank-deficient design matrix and model convergence failure
findings.fix: Add validation for survival time variance and skip Cox modeling with informative warning when insufficient time variation exists

audit_scores.reasoning: Highly specific findings with concrete file:function references and technical depth. Covers all audit dimensions comprehensively. Strong domain knowledge evident in survival analysis, calibration metrics, and medical imaging concerns.

findings.description: GLRLM (Gray Level Run Length Matrix) computation uses triple nested loops to scan for run lengths in each direction, resulting in O(n³) complexity that could be optimized using vectorized operations or built-in regionprops functionality
findings.fix: Replace nested loop run-length detection with vectorized diff-based approach or MATLAB's regionprops 'PixelList' property to identify connected components more efficiently

findings.description: Calibration slope calculation assumes linear relationship between predicted probabilities and log-odds of observed outcomes, but may be invalid when the model includes interaction terms or non-linear transformations
findings.fix: Add validation to check model linearity assumptions and provide alternative calibration measures (e.g., integrated calibration index) for non-linear models

findings.description: IVIM model fitting does not validate that signal intensities are positive values, which can cause logarithm domain errors in exponential fitting when noise or preprocessing artifacts create negative voxel values
findings.fix: Add input validation to check for negative signal intensities and either clip to small positive values or exclude affected voxels from model fitting

findings.description: Function combines survival analysis, competing risks modeling, time-varying coefficients, calibration assessment, and validation metrics in a single 800+ line function that violates single responsibility principle
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: fit_cox_models.m, assess_competing_risks.m, validate_survival_models.m, and compute_time_varying_effects.m

findings.description: All 11 core extraction methods are computed and their resulting masks stored in memory simultaneously before metrics calculation, potentially causing memory exhaustion with large 3D volumes
findings.fix: Implement lazy evaluation where each core method mask is computed, used for metrics calculation, then immediately cleared before processing the next method

findings.description: Hardcoded morphological parameters (disk radius=3, minimum component size=100, erosion iterations=2) are not adaptive to voxel spacing or tumor size, leading to suboptimal segmentation for different image resolutions
findings.fix: Make morphological parameters adaptive based on voxel spacing from NIFTI header and tumor volume, or expose as configuration options in config.json

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis calculations, which involve complex net benefit computations across threshold probabilities that are critical for clinical decision making
findings.fix: Create test_decision_curve_analysis.m with synthetic data to validate net benefit calculations, threshold selection, and clinical utility metrics

findings.description: File size validation only checks total bytes but does not prevent loading of .mat files with extremely large variable names or metadata that could cause buffer overflows during load operations
findings.fix: Add validation of .mat file structure using matfile() object to inspect variable names and dimensions before full load, and set maximum limits on variable name lengths

findings.description: Windows PowerShell escaping differs from Command Prompt escaping, but function only handles CMD-style escaping, potentially causing failures when MATLAB runs under PowerShell environments
findings.fix: Detect PowerShell vs CMD environment on Windows using environment variables and apply appropriate escaping rules for each shell type

findings.description: Hausdorff distance calculation between 3D masks uses exhaustive point-to-point distance computation without spatial indexing structures, resulting in O(mn) complexity for masks with m and n boundary points
findings.fix: Implement k-d tree or octree spatial indexing for boundary points to reduce Hausdorff distance computation to O(m log n) complexity

findings.description: Time-varying coefficient estimation assumes proportional hazards within each time interval, but does not validate this assumption or handle cases where hazards cross multiple times within intervals
findings.fix: Add Schoenfeld residual testing within each time interval and implement adaptive interval splitting when proportional hazards assumption is violated

findings.description: Mutual information calculation does not handle edge case where joint histogram has empty bins, potentially causing log(0) errors in entropy computation
findings.fix: Add small epsilon value to histogram bins before logarithm calculation and validate that images have sufficient dynamic range for meaningful mutual information

audit_scores.reasoning: High-quality audit with specific file citations and technically sound findings across all dimensions. The Cox model left truncation fix shows strong domain expertise, though some importance scores could be slightly higher for critical correctness issues.

findings.description: Texture feature extraction creates multiple copies of the parameter map for different quantization methods instead of computing quantization bins once and reusing them
findings.fix: Pre-compute quantization bins once and reuse across all texture calculations to avoid redundant data copying

findings.description: Extended Cox model with time-varying coefficients does not properly handle left truncation when patients enter the study at different calendar times
findings.fix: Add left truncation handling by adjusting entry times and recalculating at-risk sets for time-varying coefficient estimation

findings.description: IVIM model fitting does not validate that the number of b-values matches the number of DWI volumes, which can cause indexing errors during parameter estimation
findings.fix: Add validation to ensure b-values vector length matches DWI data dimensions before model fitting

findings.description: Function combines 11 different core delineation methods with metric computation in a single monolithic function, making it difficult to test individual methods
findings.fix: Split into separate functions for each core method and a coordinator function that calls them, enabling independent testing and debugging

findings.description: Jacobian determinant computation creates full-size gradient arrays for all three spatial dimensions simultaneously, consuming 3x memory unnecessarily
findings.fix: Process spatial gradients one dimension at a time and accumulate results to reduce peak memory usage

findings.description: Motion detection thresholds are hardcoded (CV > 0.15, NMI < 0.8) without adaptation to acquisition parameters or voxel size
findings.fix: Make thresholds configurable through config.json with adaptive defaults based on b-value range and voxel dimensions

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis calculations, which involve complex probability threshold optimization and net benefit computation
findings.fix: Create comprehensive unit tests covering edge cases like extreme probability thresholds and degenerate model predictions

findings.description: CSV file loading does not validate file size or content structure, potentially allowing memory exhaustion attacks through maliciously crafted large CSV files
findings.fix: Add file size validation and streaming CSV reader with row count limits to prevent memory exhaustion

findings.description: Timestamped folder creation uses datetime format that may contain characters invalid for Windows filenames (colons in time stamps)
findings.fix: Use filesystem-safe datetime formatting with underscores instead of colons for cross-platform compatibility

findings.description: Image processing converts all images to base64 strings simultaneously before API calls, causing unnecessary memory overhead for large image sets
findings.fix: Implement lazy loading with generator-based image processing to convert images to base64 only when needed for API calls

audit_scores.reasoning: Strong audit with specific file citations and technically sound fixes across all dimensions. The calibration slope and mutual information findings demonstrate good understanding of medical imaging domain concerns, though some importance scores could be slightly higher for critical issues.

findings.description: Gray-Level Run-Length Matrix (GLRLM) computation uses nested loops to calculate run-length statistics, but could be vectorized using MATLAB's regionprops and connected component analysis for significant speedup
findings.fix: Replace nested loop GLRLM calculation with vectorized approach using bwconncomp and regionprops to identify runs in each direction, then compute statistics via accumarray

findings.description: Calibration slope calculation assumes linear relationship between predicted probabilities and log-odds of observed outcomes, but does not validate model convergence or handle separation in logistic regression
findings.fix: Add convergence checking for logistic regression fit, implement Firth penalized likelihood for separation cases, and validate that calibration model coefficients are finite

findings.description: Mutual information calculation does not handle edge case where joint histogram bins have zero counts, potentially causing log(0) = -Inf in entropy computation
findings.fix: Add small epsilon to histogram counts before log calculation, or use histogram normalization that excludes zero bins from MI computation

findings.description: IVIM model fitting creates temporary arrays for all b-values and voxels simultaneously, which can consume excessive memory for high-resolution DWI with many b-values
findings.fix: Implement chunk-based processing that fits IVIM models for subsets of voxels sequentially, with configurable chunk size based on available memory

findings.description: Single function handles four different imputation methods (KNN, LOCF, Mean, Linear) with interleaved validation and comparison logic, making it difficult to extend or test individual methods
findings.fix: Extract each imputation method into separate functions (knn_impute, locf_impute, mean_impute, linear_impute) and create a central dispatcher that calls them with common validation

findings.description: Motion detection thresholds are hardcoded (CV > 0.15, NMI < 0.8, signal dropout > 20%) without adaptation to acquisition parameters or slice thickness
findings.fix: Move thresholds to config.json with defaults, and implement adaptive thresholding based on voxel size, SNR, and acquisition matrix size

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis calculations, which involve complex net benefit computation and threshold-dependent utility calculations
findings.fix: Create test_decision_curve_analysis.m with known clinical scenarios, validate net benefit calculations at different thresholds, and test edge cases with extreme probability distributions

findings.description: CSV file loading uses readtable without validating file size or content structure, potentially allowing memory exhaustion attacks via malformed CSV files
findings.fix: Add file size limits before loading, validate CSV structure and column count, implement streaming CSV reader for large files, and sanitize column names

findings.description: Timestamped folder creation uses datestr format that may contain characters invalid on some filesystems (colons in timestamps cause issues on Windows with certain configurations)
findings.fix: Replace datestr with datetime format using only filesystem-safe characters (underscores instead of colons), and validate folder name compatibility across platforms

findings.description: MAT file loading loads entire file into memory even when only specific fields are needed, causing unnecessary memory usage for large metric files
findings.fix: Use scipy.io.loadmat with variable_names parameter to load only required fields, and implement lazy loading for optional sections

audit_scores.reasoning: High-quality audit with specific file citations and technically sound findings across all dimensions, though some importance scores could be better calibrated for the medical domain context.

findings.description: GLRLM (Gray Level Run Length Matrix) computation uses nested loops with O(n³) complexity to scan all directions and run lengths across the 3D volume, but could be optimized using vectorized operations and sparse matrix representations
findings.fix: Implement vectorized GLRLM computation using cumulative sums and logical indexing to identify run lengths, reducing complexity from O(n³) to O(n log n)

findings.description: Calibration slope calculation assumes linear relationship between predicted probabilities and observed outcomes, but for survival data with time-to-event outcomes, this may not hold and could produce misleading calibration assessment
findings.fix: Implement time-dependent calibration assessment using observed vs expected survival probabilities at specific time points, and validate linearity assumption before computing slope

findings.description: Signal dropout detection does not validate that baseline signal intensities are within physiological ranges before computing dropout ratios, potentially flagging normal low-signal regions as motion artifacts
findings.fix: Add physiological signal intensity validation using tissue-specific thresholds and anatomical priors before computing dropout ratios

findings.description: Single monolithic function handles Cox PH model fitting, competing risks analysis, time-varying coefficients, model validation, and results export without clear separation of statistical modeling concerns
findings.fix: Refactor into separate functions: fit_cox_model.m, fit_competing_risks.m, validate_survival_model.m, export_survival_results.m with shared parameter structure

findings.description: All b-value volumes are loaded into memory simultaneously for model fitting, but for high b-value protocols (15+ volumes) this can exhaust system memory on workstations with limited RAM
findings.fix: Implement streaming model fitting that loads b-value subsets sequentially, fitting models in chunks and combining results, with memory usage monitoring

findings.description: Eleven different core extraction methods contain duplicated parameter validation, threshold checking, and mask post-processing code across case branches
findings.fix: Extract common validation logic into validate_core_parameters.m and post-processing into post_process_core_mask.m, called by each method

findings.description: No unit tests exist for decision curve analysis net benefit calculations, which involve complex threshold-dependent utility computations and clinical decision modeling
findings.fix: Create test_decision_curve_analysis.m with test cases for different threshold ranges, utility functions, and clinical scenarios with known expected net benefits

findings.description: CSV file loading does not validate file size limits or sanitize column headers before processing, potentially allowing denial of service through oversized files or code injection through malicious headers
findings.fix: Add file size validation, sanitize column headers using whitelist regex, and implement streaming CSV reading for large files

findings.description: Deformable registration calls external tools using system() commands with hardcoded Unix path separators and shell syntax that will fail on Windows systems
findings.fix: Use escape_shell_arg.m for all external tool paths and implement cross-platform command construction with proper path separators and shell escaping

findings.description: Image base64 encoding is performed sequentially for all images before API calls, but encoding could be done in parallel using multiprocessing to reduce preprocessing time for large image sets
findings.fix: Implement parallel base64 encoding using multiprocessing.Pool for image preprocessing, with progress tracking and error handling for corrupted images

findings.description: Time-varying coefficient estimation does not account for informative censoring when patients are censored due to treatment-related toxicity, leading to biased hazard ratio estimates
findings.fix: Implement inverse probability of censoring weighting (IPCW) for informative censoring scenarios and validate censoring mechanism assumptions

findings.description: Mutual information calculation does not handle edge cases where image histograms have zero entries, causing log(0) errors in entropy computation
findings.fix: Add small epsilon value to histogram bins before entropy calculation and validate that images have sufficient dynamic range for meaningful MI computation
